---
name: 💬 Discussion / decision
about: Open a design discussion or a decision that may become an ADR
title: "discussion: <topic>"
labels: question
---

<!--
Use this for direction-setting questions and decisions (often producing an ADR under docs/adr/),
not for a concrete bug or a ready-to-build feature. The goal is to converge on a decision + rationale.
-->

## Context / problem

<!-- What's the question, and why does it need a deliberate decision now? -->

## Options

<!-- Lay out the real candidates with their trade-offs. -->

1. **Option A** — …
2. **Option B** — …
3. **Option C** — …

## Constraints

<!-- What any option must respect: the eight invariants, threat model, cross-platform story,
     dependency budget, backwards compatibility, etc. -->

## Decision criteria

<!-- How we'll choose between the options. -->

## Proposed deliverable

<!-- e.g. an ADR under docs/adr/ capturing the decision + rationale, then follow-up
     implementation issues. -->
